tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Beyonce Knowles - Sweet Dreams 
chords by shaina771
  
Capo on the 4th

Chords  
[ch]Em[/ch] -[ch]Bm[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch]- [ch]Am[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Every night I rush to my bed[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
With hopes that maybe I'll get a chance to see you when I close my [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
eyes I'm going out of my head[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
Clouds filled with stars cover the skies [/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]

What kinda dream is this?
